response.justification: Strong senior engineer with broad technical experience across web, backend, and open-source projects, plus relevant Linux/Python-adjacent work and an active GIS open-source platform. However, the role demands German at C1 minimum and the resume states only basic German, which is a hard blocker. Leadership experience is also more implicit (mentoring, workshops, founder of open-source project) than formal team-lead/head-of-development tenure.
strengths: Deep polyglot engineering background with open-source and Linux affinity
Founder/maintainer of GISCollective demonstrates architectural ownership
Teaching, workshops, and mentoring experience signal leadership potential
concerns: German listed as Basic; role requires C1 minimum
No explicit Head/Tech Lead title or formal team-management track record
Limited evidence of UML modeling and formal requirements management

key_factors.factor: Senior engineering breadth and OSS leadership
